title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years in the Twinkle Series with
Tamamo Cross have come to an end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a solid career, our efforts paid off in an
offer neither of us could have seen coming.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Did I hear ya right? A manga?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And they wanna make me the main character... You jerkin' my chain here?
choice_data_list: No, we really did get an offer.
No, we really did get an offer.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
A manga... Me, in a manga... An actual manga
with me in it...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I never woulda imagined this for myself. But...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The li'l squirts back home might like it. I can see
'em now, waltzin' 'round the neighborhood,
braggin' about their big sis...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I bet they'd be proud of me. With all the
attention, I'd practically be a star.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Just... it's kinda embarrassin' thinkin' about it...
Me showin' up in a manga. What should I do
here?
choice_data_list:
Well, it would certainly add to your family
finances.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Then why didn'tcha lead with that?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... And if I get even more people talkin' 'bout
me, I'd get more royalties in my pocket...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that settles it. I accept! Which means that
startin' now, in all the races I got comin' up...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I gotta run my butt off!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Why are ya lookin' at me like I said
somethin' crazy?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Well, whatever. C'mon, let's hold a meetin'...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama! Trainer! Listen to this!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's goin' on, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm going to be the protagonist in a manga.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wh-what the—you too? I mean, coincidences do happen...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Geez, we sure are popular...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That brings me to my request. Tama, I want you
to be in my manga.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It'll be boring without you showing up. I can't
even imagine it without you.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You want me in the Oguri manga, huh...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Fine by me. But I sure hope ya know what you're
in for, comin' to me with that kinda offer.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: This could cost ya, big time.
choice_data_list: You don't mean... you're going to charge her?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What?! No! I mean that if I'm gonna be in Oguri's
manga, I'm stealin' da show.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri! I'm about to put ya on a losin' streak a mile long! That story of yours is gonna go my way.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So if ya wanna keep the lead role in your own
manga, ya better come at me like ya mean it!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...You got it, Tama!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, the two head off to the training
grounds together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems White Lightning's popularity can't be
contained to the real world, and soon her exploits
will line the shelves of countless bookstores.
